## Approval State

- [ ] Direction explicitly approved by a human

- [ ] `make html`
- [ ] `make text`

## Notes For Reviewers

- Does this PR expose any unpublished working materials or internal review materials?
- Are normative changes clearly distinguishable from editorial cleanup?
